specific_question: What was the customer rate for Elexion Automotive's maintenance program subscribers in Q3 2024?
answer: In Q3 2024, Elexion Automotive's extended maintenance program increased its customer retention rate among subscribers from 81% in Q2 2024 to 87% in Q3.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
